# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: n1-standard-1
      disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        type: PERSISTENT
        boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
          diskType: pd-standard
          diskSizeGb: 10
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: global/networks/default
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: enable-oslogin
          value: "TRUE"
        - key: block-project-ssh-keys
          value: "TRUE"
      shieldedInstanceConfig:
        enableSecureBoot: true
        enableVtpm: true
        enableIntegrityMonitoring: true

- name: instance-group-manager
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    targetSize: 2
    baseInstanceName: secure-instance
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.instance-template.selfLink)
    updatePolicy:
      type: PROACTIVE
      minimalAction: REPLACE
      maxSurge:
        fixed: 1
      maxUnavailable:
        fixed: 0

- name: firewall-allow-health-check
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"
      - "443"

- name: firewall-deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: global/networks/default
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    denied:
    - IPProtocol: all
